야고보서 3:1.content: Let not many of you be teachers, my brothers, knowing that we will receive heavier judgment.

야고보서 3:2.content: For we all stumble in many things. Anyone who doesn’t stumble in word is a perfect person, able to bridle the whole body also.

야고보서 3:3.content: Indeed, we put bits into the horses’ mouths so that they may obey us, and we guide their whole body.

야고보서 3:4.content: Behold, the ships also, though they are so big and are driven by fierce winds, are yet guided by a very small rudder, wherever the pilot desires.

야고보서 3:5.content: So the tongue is also a little member, and boasts great things. See how a small fire can spread to a large forest!

야고보서 3:6.content: And the tongue is a fire. The world of iniquity among our members is the tongue, which defiles the whole body, and sets on fire the course of nature, and is set on fire by Gehenna.

야고보서 3:7.content: For every kind of animal, bird, creeping thing, and sea creature, is tamed, and has been tamed by mankind;

야고보서 3:8.content: but nobody can tame the tongue. It is a restless evil, full of deadly poison.

야고보서 3:9.content: With it we bless our God and Father, and with it we curse men who are made in the image of God.

야고보서 3:10.content: Out of the same mouth comes blessing and cursing. My brothers, these things ought not to be so.

야고보서 3:11.content: Does a spring send out from the same opening fresh and bitter water?

야고보서 3:12.content: Can a fig tree, my brothers, yield olives, or a vine figs? Thus no spring yields both salt water and fresh water.

야고보서 3:13.content: Who is wise and understanding among you? Let him show by his good conduct that his deeds are done in gentleness of wisdom.

야고보서 3:14.content: But if you have bitter jealousy and selfish ambition in your heart, don’t boast and don’t lie against the truth.

야고보서 3:15.content: This wisdom is not that which comes down from above, but is earthly, sensual, and demonic.

야고보서 3:16.content: For where jealousy and selfish ambition are, there is confusion and every evil deed.

야고보서 3:17.content: But the wisdom that is from above is first pure, then peaceful, gentle, reasonable, full of mercy and good fruits, without partiality, and without hypocrisy.

야고보서 3:18.content: Now the fruit of righteousness is sown in peace by those who make peace.
